items.briefing:
Australian small businesses are being urged to stay alert to scams, with Scamwatch highlighting ongoing risks targeting businesses through deceptive emails, fake invoices, and social engineering. Separately, Google has flagged a surge in Chinese-linked phishing activity alongside a newly identified software vulnerability, a reminder that cyber threats targeting Australian organisations remain active and evolving.

A practical reminder for your organisation: if you receive an unexpected invoice or payment request by email, always verify it through a separate, known phone number before transferring any funds.

featured.title: Kinetic IT report flags AI & sovereign execution gap
featured.quote: Australian agencies lack funding and skills to safely deploy AI systems securely.
